# mihomo Alpha

MClash controls the MetaCubeX mihomo Alpha core as a separate process.

- Source: https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/tree/Alpha
- Release channel: `Prerelease-Alpha`
- License: GPL-3.0

Run `scripts/fetch-mihomo-alpha.sh` to download the architecture-appropriate
binary, verify its published SHA-256 checksum, and place a copy of the upstream
license in the application resources. Any distributed build must retain the
license and provide the corresponding source offer required by GPL-3.0.
